title: AgentLinux preserve_paths.json
description: Per-agent allowlist of home-relative paths that MUST survive REMEDIATE-04 uninstall+reinstall (Phase 14 Plan 14-03, CAT-04). Each path must start with '~/' or be home-relative; absolute paths and '..' traversal are rejected by the loader (T-14-04 mitigation).

items.description: Home-relative path (must start with '~/'). Path traversal ('..') is rejected by the loader, not the schema (path normalization is a runtime concern).

comment.description: Free-form human-readable explanation. Not consumed by the loader.
